problem id: 52862572
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11110111 -> 10111111
  10110011 -> 10111111
  10100001 -> 00100111
  01101011 -> 00010011
  10000110 -> 10001100
  01000001 -> 01010111
  11111101 -> 11101111
  01010001 -> 11011111

query: 01011010
predicted answer: 00000010
